🎮 CONTROLS

WASD : Directional Motion

Space : Jump / Fly Up

Shift : Sneak / Fly Down

F : Toggle flight engine

V : Toggle First/Third Person

E : Toggle Customizer Modal

Left Click : Break voxel block / Attack

Right Click : Place hotbar voxel block

1 - 9 : Hotbar slot selector
